title: Twisted Crunchy Mozzabite Bites
description: A crispy and flavorful snack made with twist, crunchy, and mozzabite. Perfect for a quick snack or appetizer.
instructions: Unroll the twist and cut into 1-inch squares.
In a bowl, mix the crunchy and mozzabite.
Add the twist squares to the bowl and mix well.
Place the mixture on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
